top_signals.title: Venezuela’s Oil Revival Faces a Critical Services Bottleneck
top_signals.summary: Venezuela's upstream industry has entered a new phase. Following sweeping hydrocarbon reforms and broader geopolitical developments in early 2026, the conversation has shifted from whether the country can reopen its oil sector to whether it can successfully execute a meaningful production recovery. The country's resource potential has never been in doubt. The greater challenge now lies in converting policy momentum into sustained operational growth. Rystad Energy estimates Venezuela's crude production could increase by approximately 17%, or around…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: India Asks State Banks to Step Up Foreign Currency Deposits
top_signals.summary: India has asked state-owned banks to intensify efforts to garner foreign currency deposits from the 35-million-strong diaspora, as the country seeks to boost its external buffers and shore up the flagging rupee.

top_signals.title: U.S. crude jumps above $80 as Iran ceasefire fractures; Trump's Hormuz toll plans reignite supply fears - CNBC
top_signals.summary: U.S. crude jumps above $80 as Iran ceasefire fractures; Trump's Hormuz toll plans reignite supply fears  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Supreme Court Justice Barrett says 'the threat level is really high' in budget testimony
top_signals.summary: Supreme Court Justices Amy Coney Barrett and Elena Kagan are testifying about the high court's budget request, which includes higher spending for security.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan says Hyperliquid's rise threatens Circle's USDC economics
